baseline.scope_note: Measured before adding the R2-M01 audit and test files; no test execution was involved.

migration_rules.invalid_input_policy: Keep intentionally invalid calls and add the narrow error-code suppression only when mypy cannot express the negative test.

cohorts.activation_criterion: Every listed repository-policy test passes mypy --strict together in the pinned CI environment.
cohorts.selection: Tests that own repository policy, release, generated-surface, and local or CI drift gates.

cohorts.activation_criterion: Promote owner slices of at most 40 files after strict typing, focused runtime tests, and claim-boundary review pass together.
cohorts.selection: Claim-bearing evidence, provenance, release, status-ledger, and publication-boundary tests.

cohorts.activation_criterion: Promote adapter-owner slices after intentional invalid-input calls use narrow suppressions and no live provider access is introduced.
cohorts.selection: Hardware adapters, provider validation, approval, budget, attestation, and result-pack tests.

cohorts.activation_criterion: Promote one source-owned scientific family per slice with focused invariant tests and no widening of scientific claims.
cohorts.selection: Numerical, compiler, differentiable, control, QEC, and analysis runtime-contract tests.

cohorts.activation_criterion: Address only after higher-risk cohorts; mechanical annotations alone do not justify displacing defect-bearing work.
cohorts.selection: Legacy fixtures and broad parameterisation surfaces dominated by annotation-only debt.
